DECLARATION OF HERBERT W. YANOWITZ IN RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRANDSTETTER, MARIE Z AS TRUSTEE OF THE BRANDSTETTER FAMILY TRUST DATED SEPTEMBER 22, 1993

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
